title: Edsal MuscleRack 4-Tier Heavy Duty Steel Shelving Unit Set of 2 | 148x75x30 cm | 175kg Load Per Shelf (700kg Per Bay) | 2x Storage Shelves | 4 Tier Garage Shelving
features: Heavy Duty Garage Shelving Unit: 4-tier boltless racking system with 4mm MDF boards and reinforced steel frame, perfect as a metal storage rack for garage, workshop, warehouse, shed, or utility room
Strong Load Capacity: Each shelf holds up to 175kg, with a total load of 700kg UDL, ideal garage storage shelves for tools, boxes, equipment, and bulky household items
Adjustable Metal Shelves: Fully height-adjustable in 12cm increments, configure your shelving unit as one tall rack, two smaller storage units, or even a workbench to suit your space
Quick Boltless Assembly: Easy clip-in design, no bolts, nuts, or screws required; this garage racking system assembles in minutes using just a rubber mallet
Durable & Stable Storage: Galvanised steel uprights resist rust and corrosion; reinforced design keeps your garage shelving rack sturdy
description: Product Description Edsal Musclerack 4 Tier Garage Shelving Specialist in Shelving & Storage Solutions Tidy up your garage, workshop, store room or shed with our Heavy duty Musclerack shelving units; the ideal storage for boxed goods & bulk storage. Key Features Holds 175kg per shelf Holds 600kg per bay Boltless assembly Adjustable shelves Made of strong galvanised steel Simple No Bolt Assembly No nuts or bolts, just simply tap each shelf together securely. Adjustable shelves can be raised or lowered in 12cm increments. Profiled Steel Uprights Galvanised steel shelving frame provides maximum strength and stability. Flush fitting MDF boards allows extra evenly distributed support with easy and safe removal of items from the shelves. Reinforced Shelf Supports Each shelf has a reinforced shelf support at the bottom for greater stability and stronger weight loading. Anti Scratch Plastic Feet Each shelf comes with eight anti-scratch plastic feet depending if you have the unit built as one 4 tier shelf or break it down into two workbenches. Simple Boltless Assembly Quick and easy assembly, No messing around with nuts, bolts or screws.
